{{CargoRelic
|name=Athena's Delight
|class_id=20153
|rank=Green
|affct=ART
|source=
|description=Athena's most important treasure contains immeasurable power. But after she was attacked and sealed, the treasure was also lost. It is said that whoever possesses it can earn Athena's affection...
|fame=15
|art=31
|fth=14
|civ=13
|tech=17
|ss1=Per 4 Costumes fully ascended, Snail ATK +1<br>Costumes Perfected: 160/160
|ss2=Per 4 Costumes fully ascended, Snail ATK +2<br>Costumes Perfected: 160/160
|ss3=Per 4 Costumes fully ascended, Snail ATK +3<br>Costumes Perfected: 160/160
|ss4=Per 4 Costumes fully ascended, Snail ATK +3<br>Costumes Perfected: 160/160
|ss7=Per 4 Costumes fully ascended, Snail ATK +3<br>Costumes Perfected: 160/160<br> (Awakened)
}}
